item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-022","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response correctly separates the AI long-term thesis from the fragile carrier of a single startup stock and concentrated all-in exposure.
